languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Боль иногда возвращается и я снова... забываюсь. Но местные ученые мужи мне помогают ее утихомирить. Я во время процедур слушаю их разговоры и диву даюсь. Того гляди и сам так поумнею!"

"Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Боль иногда возвращается и я снова... забываюсь. Но местные ученые мужи мне помогают ее утихомирить. Я во время процедур слушаю их разговоры и диву даюсь. Того гляди и сам так поумнею!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

"Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

"Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

languages.text: 「船長様！時々痛みは戻って、私は…私自身を忘れてしまいます。でも、このあたりでは賢い人が助けてくれます。治療の間、彼らが話しているのを聞いて、私は驚嘆します。いつか私も彼らと同じくらい賢くなるでしょう、きっと！」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

traits.locale_text: 「船長様！時々痛みは戻って、私は…私自身を忘れてしまいます。でも、このあたりでは賢い人が助けてくれます。治療の間、彼らが話しているのを聞いて、私は驚嘆します。いつか私も彼らと同じくらい賢くなるでしょう、きっと！」

languages.text: “舰长大人！疼痛有时会反复，我……我也会失去理智。但是这里的聪明人能帮我平息它。治疗时，我听他们说话，满心只有惊叹。总有一天，我也能像他们那样聪明，一定能！”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！疼痛有时会反复，我……我也会失去理智。但是这里的聪明人能帮我平息它。治疗时，我听他们说话，满心只有惊叹。总有一天，我也能像他们那样聪明，一定能！”

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Parfois, la douleur revient et alors je... je me laisse emporter. Heureusement, les grands esprits du secteur m'aident à la faire taire. Quand je les écoute parler pendant mes traitements, je ne peux que m'émerveiller. Je serai aussi intelligent qu'eux un jour, j'en suis persuadé ! »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Parfois, la douleur revient et alors je... je me laisse emporter. Heureusement, les grands esprits du secteur m'aident à la faire taire. Quand je les écoute parler pendant mes traitements, je ne peux que m'émerveiller. Je serai aussi intelligent qu'eux un jour, j'en suis persuadé ! »

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! A veces el dolor vuelve y... y olvido mi lugar. Pero las personas inteligentes que hay aquí me ayudan a calmarme. Las escucho hablar durante mis tratamientos y me maravillo. ¡Algún día seré tan listo como ellos, ya lo verá!».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! A veces el dolor vuelve y... y olvido mi lugar. Pero las personas inteligentes que hay aquí me ayudan a calmarme. Las escucho hablar durante mis tratamientos y me maravillo. ¡Algún día seré tan listo como ellos, ya lo verá!».

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Bazen acı geri dönüyor ve ben... Kendimi kaybediyorum. Fakat buradaki akıllılar onu dindirmeme yardım ediyor. Tedavilerim sırasında onların konuşmalarını dinliyor ve hayran kalıyorum. Bir gün ben de onlar kadar akıllı olacağım!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan! Bazen acı geri dönüyor ve ben... Kendimi kaybediyorum. Fakat buradaki akıllılar onu dindirmeme yardım ediyor. Tedavilerim sırasında onların konuşmalarını dinliyor ve hayran kalıyorum. Bir gün ben de onlar kadar akıllı olacağım!"

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Manchmal kehrt der Schmerz zurück und ich ... Ich vergesse mich. Aber die klugen Leute hier helfen mir, ihn zu stillen. Ich höre sie reden, während sie mich behandeln, und staune. Eines Tages werde ich genauso klug sein, ganz bestimmt!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! Sometimes the pain comes back and I... I forget myself. But the clever ones around here help me to quiet it. I listen to them talk during my treatments and I marvel. I'll be as clever as them someday, I'm sure!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Manchmal kehrt der Schmerz zurück und ich ... Ich vergesse mich. Aber die klugen Leute hier helfen mir, ihn zu stillen. Ich höre sie reden, während sie mich behandeln, und staune. Eines Tages werde ich genauso klug sein, ganz bestimmt!"
